sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT 
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
where 
(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
 and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)

SELECT 
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` AS __metric__,
 COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS count,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` AS __time__
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
where 
(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
 and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
group by __metric__, __time__

SELECT 
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS inccount,
DATE(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`) as __time__
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
where 
(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= currentDate() - (31536000)
group by __time__
order by __time__ asc

SELECT 
COUNT(`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID`) Changes
from
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`
where 
(`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
 and (`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)

SELECT 
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Priority` AS __metric__,
COUNT(`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID`) AS Changes,
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submit Date` AS __time__
FROM
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`
where 
(`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
 and (`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
group by __metric__, __time__

SELECT 
COUNT(`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID`) AS Changes,
DATE(`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submit Date`) as __time__
FROM
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`
where 
(`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submit Date` >= currentDate() - (31536000)
group by __time__
order by __time__ asc

panels.title: Change request trend for last 12 months

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`SRM:Request`.`AppRequestID` AS C1
FROM
`SRM:Request` 

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT 
COUNT(`SRM:Request`.`AppRequestID`) Changes
from
`SRM:Request`
where 
(`SRM:Request`.`Location Company` In ($Company)) 
 and (`SRM:Request`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `SRM:Request`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)

SELECT 
`SRM:Request`.`Priority` AS __metric__,
COUNT(DISTINCT(`SRM:Request`.`AppRequestID`)) AS requests,
`SRM:Request`.`Submit Date` AS __time__
FROM
`SRM:Request`
where 
(`SRM:Request`.`Location Company` In ($Company)) 
 and (`SRM:Request`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `SRM:Request`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
group by __metric__, __time__

SELECT 
COUNT(DISTINCT(`SRM:Request`.`AppRequestID`)) AS requests,
--SubStr(datename('mm',`SRM:Request`.`Submit Date`),0,2)+ ' '+upper(Year(`SRM:Request`.`Submit Date`)) AS monthyear
DATE(`SRM:Request`.`Submit Date`) as __time__
FROM
`SRM:Request`
where 
(`SRM:Request`.`Location Company` In ($Company)) 
and `SRM:Request`.`Submit Date` >= currentDate() - (31536000)
group by __time__
order by __time__ asc

panels.title: SRM Service request trend for last 12 months

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`SRM:Request`.`AppRequestID` AS C1
FROM
`SRM:Request` 

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT COUNT(`Request ID`) Requests
FROM`myit-sb:ServiceRequest`
 INNER JOIN `CTM:People` on (`CTM:People`.`Remedy Login ID` = `myit-sb:ServiceRequest`.`RequestingUserId`)
where 
(`CTM:People`.`Company` in ($Company))
 and (`myit-sb:ServiceRequest`.`SubmittedDate` >= $__from/1000 and `myit-sb:ServiceRequest`.`SubmittedDate` <= $__to/1000)

SELECT 
COUNT(`Request ID`) Requests,
`myit-sb:ServiceRequest`.`RequestState` AS __metric__,
`myit-sb:ServiceRequest`.`SubmittedDate` AS __time__
FROM`myit-sb:ServiceRequest`
 INNER JOIN `CTM:People` on (`CTM:People`.`Remedy Login ID` = `myit-sb:ServiceRequest`.`RequestingUserId`)
where 
(`CTM:People`.`Company` in ($Company))
 and (`myit-sb:ServiceRequest`.`SubmittedDate` >= $__from/1000 and `myit-sb:ServiceRequest`.`SubmittedDate` <= $__to/1000)
 group by __metric__, __time__

SELECT 
COUNT(`Request ID`) Requests,
DATE(`myit-sb:ServiceRequest`.`SubmittedDate`) AS __time__
FROM
`myit-sb:ServiceRequest` 
INNER JOIN `CTM:People` on (`CTM:People`.`Remedy Login ID` = `myit-sb:ServiceRequest`.`RequestingUserId`)
where 
(`CTM:People`.`Company` in ($Company))
and `myit-sb:ServiceRequest`.`SubmittedDate` >= currentDate() - (31536000)
 group by __time__
order by __time__ asc

panels.title: DWPC Service request trend for last 12 months

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT 
(COUNT(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`)) AS Total
FROM `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem Investigation`
where 
(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
 and (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)

SELECT 
`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Priority` AS __metric__,
(COUNT(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`)) AS Total,
`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date` AS __time__
FROM
`PBM:Problem Investigation`
where 
(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
 and (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
group by __metric__, __time__

SELECT 
COUNT(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`) AS problems,
DATE(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`) as __time__
FROM
`PBM:Problem Investigation`
where 
(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
and `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date` >= currentDate() - (31536000)
group by __time__
order by __time__ asc

SELECT 
Count(`PBM:Known Error`.`Known Error ID`)
FROM `PBM:Known Error` 
where

 and (`PBM:Known Error`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `PBM:Known Error`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)

SELECT 
`PBM:Known Error`.`Priority` AS __metric__,
Count(`PBM:Known Error`.`Known Error ID`) as pbmcount,
`PBM:Known Error`.`Submit Date` AS __time__
FROM

where 
(`PBM:Known Error`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
 and (`PBM:Known Error`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `PBM:Known Error`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)

SELECT

DATE(`PBM:Known Error`.`Submit Date`) AS __time__

where 
(`PBM:Known Error`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
and `PBM:Known Error`.`Submit Date` >= currentDate() - (31536000)
group by __time__

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT 
  COUNT(`WOI:WorkOrder`.`Work Order ID`) AS count
FROM `AR System Schema`.`WOI:WorkOrder`
where 
(`WOI:WorkOrder`.`Customer Company` In ($Company)) 
 and (`WOI:WorkOrder`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)

SELECT 
`WOI:WorkOrder`.`Priority` AS __metric__,
COUNT(`WOI:WorkOrder`.`Work Order ID`) AS workordercount,
`WOI:WorkOrder`.`Submit Date` AS __time__
FROM
`WOI:WorkOrder`
where 
(`WOI:WorkOrder`.`Customer Company` In ($Company)) 
 and (`WOI:WorkOrder`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
group by __metric__, __time__

SELECT 
COUNT(`WOI:WorkOrder`.`Work Order ID`) AS workordercount,
DATE(`WOI:WorkOrder`.`Submit Date`) as __time__
FROM
`WOI:WorkOrder`
where 
(`WOI:WorkOrder`.`Customer Company` In ($Company)) 
and `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Submit Date` >= currentDate() - (31536000)
group by __time__
order by __time__ asc

SELECT 
  COUNT(`RMS:Release`.`ReleaseID`) AS count
FROM `AR System Schema`.`RMS:Release`
where 
(`RMS:Release`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
 and (`RMS:Release`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `RMS:Release`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)

SELECT 
`RMS:Release`.`Priority` AS __metric__,
COUNT(`RMS:Release`.`ReleaseID`) AS workordercount,
`RMS:Release`.`Submit Date` AS __time__
FROM
`RMS:Release`
where 
(`RMS:Release`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
 and (`RMS:Release`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `RMS:Release`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
group by __metric__, __time__

SELECT

panels.title: Release request trend for last 12  months

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT 
  COUNT(`AST:PurchaseRequisition`.`Requisition ID`) AS count
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:PurchaseRequisition`
where 
(`AST:PurchaseRequisition`.`By_Company` In ($Company)) and
  (`AST:PurchaseRequisition`.`Date Created` >= $__from/1000 and `AST:PurchaseRequisition`.`Date Created` <= $__to/1000)

SELECT 
`AST:PurchaseRequisition`.`Status` AS __metric__,
COUNT(`AST:PurchaseRequisition`.`Requisition ID`) AS PRcount,
`AST:PurchaseRequisition`.`Date Created` AS __time__
FROM
`AST:PurchaseRequisition`
where 
(`AST:PurchaseRequisition`.`By_Company` In ($Company)) and
  (`AST:PurchaseRequisition`.`Date Created` >= $__from/1000 and `AST:PurchaseRequisition`.`Date Created` <= $__to/1000)
group by __metric__, __time__

SELECT 
COUNT(`AST:PurchaseRequisition`.`Requisition ID`) AS PRcount,
DATE(`AST:PurchaseRequisition`.`Date Created`) as __time__
FROM
`AST:PurchaseRequisition`
where 
(`AST:PurchaseRequisition`.`By_Company` In ($Company))
and DATEDIFF('day', `AST:PurchaseRequisition`.`Date Created`, currentDate()) > 0 AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:PurchaseRequisition`.`Date Created`, currentDate()) <= 365
and `AST:PurchaseRequisition`.`Date Created` >= currentDate() - (31536000)
group by __time__
order by __time__ asc

panels.title: Purchase request trend for last 12 months

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT 
  COUNT(`AST:PurchaseLineItem`.`instanceId`) AS count
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:PurchaseLineItem`
where 
(`AST:PurchaseLineItem`.`RequestedFor_Company` In ($Company)) and
`AST:PurchaseLineItem`.`Status` >=5 and
  (`AST:PurchaseLineItem`.`Create-date` >= $__from/1000 and `AST:PurchaseLineItem`.`Create-date` <= $__to/1000)

SELECT 
  COUNT(`AST:PurchaseLineItem`.`instanceId`) AS count,
  `AST:PurchaseLineItem`.`Status` AS __metric__,
  `AST:PurchaseLineItem`.`Create-date` AS __time__
FROM `AST:PurchaseLineItem`
where 
(`AST:PurchaseLineItem`.`RequestedFor_Company` In ($Company)) and
`AST:PurchaseLineItem`.`Status` >=5 and
  (`AST:PurchaseLineItem`.`Create-date` >= $__from/1000 and `AST:PurchaseLineItem`.`Create-date` <= $__to/1000)
group by __metric__, __time__

SELECT 
  COUNT(`AST:PurchaseLineItem`.`instanceId`) AS count,
  DATE(`AST:PurchaseLineItem`.`Create-date`) AS __time__
FROM `AST:PurchaseLineItem`
where 
(`AST:PurchaseLineItem`.`RequestedFor_Company` In ($Company))
and `AST:PurchaseLineItem`.`Status` >=5 
and `AST:PurchaseLineItem`.`Create-date` >= currentDate() - (31536000)
group by __time__
order by __time__ asc

list.definition: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT `HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk` where (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= currentDate() - (31536000)) UNION SELECT DISTINCT `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Company` FROM `AR System Schema`.`CHG:Infrastructure Change` WHERE (`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submit Date` >= currentDate() - (31536000)) LIMIT 1000 UNION SELECT DISTINCT `SRM:Request`.`Location Company` FROM `AR System Schema`.`SRM:Request` WHERE (`SRM:Request`.`Submit Date` >= currentDate() - (31536000)) LIMIT 1000 UNION SELECT DISTINCT `CTM:People`.`Company` FROM `AR System Schema`.`CTM:People` LIMIT 1000 UNION SELECT DISTINCT `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Company` FROM `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem Investigation` WHERE (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date` >= currentDate() - (31536000)) LIMIT 1000 UNION SELECT DISTINCT `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Known Error`.`Company` FROM `PBM:Known Error` WHERE `PBM:Known Error`.`Submit Date` >= currentDate() - (31536000) LIMIT 1000 UNION SELECT DISTINCT `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Customer Company` FROM `AR System Schema`.`WOI:WorkOrder` WHERE (`WOI:WorkOrder`.`Submit Date` >= currentDate() - (31536000)) LIMIT 1000 UNION SELECT DISTINCT `RMS:Release`.`Company` FROM `AR System Schema`.`RMS:Release`.`Company` WHERE (`RMS:Release`.`Submit Date` >= currentDate() - (31536000)) LIMIT 1000 UNION SELECT DISTINCT `AST:PurchaseRequisition`.`By_Company` FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:PurchaseRequisition` WHERE (`AST:PurchaseRequisition`.`Date Created` >= currentDate() - (31536000)) LIMIT 1000 UNION SELECT DISTINCT `AST:PurchaseLineItem`.`RequestedFor_Company` FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:PurchaseLineItem` WHERE `AST:PurchaseLineItem`.`Status` >=5 and (`AST:PurchaseLineItem`.`Create-date` >= currentDate() - (31536000)) LIMIT 1000"}

title: Count of ITSM Tickets and Requests
